_comment: Orkes Conductor workflow definition for the ReferralGuard agent pipeline. Each agent step is a task; this maps our pipeline 1:1 onto Conductor so it can be orchestrated, retried, and observed at scale. Import via the Orkes Conductor UI or POST to /api/metadata/workflow. The reference implementation in backend/agent_pipeline.py runs the same DAG in-process for the demo.
name: referralguard_prior_auth

tasks.name: extraction_agent
tasks.description: Claude extracts typed fields from raw/transcribed referral text

tasks.name: validation_agent
tasks.description: Member-ID validation; raises captured-by-Sentry exception on malformed input

tasks.name: denial_risk_agent
tasks.description: Claude reasons over payer policy to predict denial risk

READY TO SUBMIT.name: human_approval_gate
READY TO SUBMIT.description: Prior auth legally requires a human sign-off before submission. This WAIT task pauses the workflow indefinitely until an approver completes it (POST /api/tasks with COMPLETED), at which point the workflow resumes to submission.

READY TO SUBMIT.name: submission_agent
READY TO SUBMIT.description: Browserbase hosted browser submits the PA to the payer portal and returns a confirmation

defaultCase.name: route_human_review
defaultCase.description: NEEDS INFO / HIGH DENIAL RISK -> return to referring clinic with reasons
